full_text:
Lu Cui (Wenwei) 路粹 (文蔚)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Cui (路粹), styledWenwei (文蔚), was born in Chenliu. He accused Kong Rong of having higher ambitions that warranted death, which was believed. Lu Cui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Lu Cui lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
